name: per_player_touch_rate_type
description: Test case for per_player_touch rate type (rush attempts + receptions denominator)
expected_query: with "t72235513fa194f27d28774fd5f201f72" as materialized (select "t"."pid" as "pid", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" cross join LATERAL (VALUES (nfl_plays.bc_pid), (CASE WHEN nfl_plays.comp = true THEN nfl_plays.trg_pid END)) AS t(pid) where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and t.pid IS NOT NULL and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "t"."pid"), "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" as materialized (select nfl_plays.trg_pid AS pid, SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS m_dc7a82da7c34 from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "nfl_plays"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023) and not "nfl_plays"."play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by nfl_plays.trg_pid) select "player"."pid", CAST(MAX(rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379.m_dc7a82da7c34) AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(MAX(t72235513fa194f27d28774fd5f201f72.rate_type_total_count) AS DECIMAL), 0) AS trg_from_plays_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "t72235513fa194f27d28774fd5f201f72" on "t72235513fa194f27d28774fd5f201f72"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379" on "rate_aggregate_94cfb3c83379"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
